concerns: Step 3 says Object.freeze but storageSupport is a nested object — plan should specify whether shallow freeze is acceptable or if nested freeze calls are needed (the risks section flags this but the step doesn't resolve it)

The doNotTrack sentinel change from 'unspecified' to 'unknown' is semantically questionable: per the plan's own definitions, 'unknown' means the API doesn't exist, but navigator.doNotTrack does exist — the user simply hasn't expressed a preference. Consider whether 'unspecified' should remain as-is or whether the 'unknown' definition needs broadening to cover 'value not set'.
